caption: A man with glasses and a black t-shirt featuring a graphic design stands in what appears to be a classroom or presentation setting. He is wearing a lanyard with an ID badge around his neck. Initially, he is standing with one hand slightly raised, as if gesturing while speaking. As the sequence progresses, he brings both hands together in front of him, palms up, suggesting he is emphasizing a point or explaining something. The background includes a whiteboard and part of a chair, indicating an educational or professional environment. His body language and gestures convey engagement and a focus on communication.
